name: signingImportKey
title: Import Key (Signing Service)
description: Imports an existing Ed25519 seed into the peer's signing service key store. Requires authentication. This is an elevated operation — on first call (without confirmToken), returns a confirmation URL that the user must visit in a browser to approve. After approval, retry with the confirmToken to complete the import. Part of the signing service: see also signingServiceInfo, signingCreateKey, signingListKeys, signingSign, signingGetJWT, signingExportKey, signingDeleteKey, signingChangePassphrase.

seed.description: Ed25519 seed to import (64-character hex string, e.g. 0x...)

passphrase.description: Passphrase for at-rest encryption of the imported key

confirmToken.description: Confirmation token from browser approval (omit on first call)

publicKey.description: Public key derived from the imported seed (returned after confirmation)

status.description: confirmation_required when user approval is needed

confirmUrl.description: URL for user to visit and approve the operation

confirmToken.description: Token to include when retrying after approval
